raw_source.title: SynFutures is looking for two key positions: AI x Blockchain Engineer and DeFi Trader
raw_source.body:
**About SynFutures**
 
SynFutures ($F) is a leading decentralized exchange and full-stack financial infrastructure provider. Leveraging its innovative Oyster AMM model and fully onchain order-matching engine, SynFutures empowers anyone to list and trade any asset with leverage. With the debut of its AI assistant, Synthia, SynFutures is enhancing decentralized finance infrastructure with advanced intelligence and a seamless user experience.

Backed by top-tier institutions including Pantera, Polychain, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, Framework, and SIG, SynFutures dominates the decentralized perpetual futures market on Base with over 50% market share and ranks among the top five globally.

To learn more, visit http://www.synfutures.com/

**Roles & Responsibilities**

SynFutures is looking for passionate and experienced professionals to join our team. We are currently hiring for two key positions: AI x Blockchain Engineer and DeFi Trader.

 
**【AI x Blockchain Engineer】**

We are seeking an AI x Blockchain Engineer with a strong background in AI, trading, and blockchain technology. This role focuses on AI-driven data signal processing, trading strategy development, and building an AI-Web3 infrastructure for DeFi. The ideal candidate should have deep expertise in AI models, algorithmic trading, and blockchain infrastructure.

**Responsibilities:**
•	Develop AI & Web3 Infrastructure
o	Build and maintain a scalable AI-powered Web3 framework for DeFi applications.
o	Ensure robust security and efficiency in AI-integrated blockchain solutions.
•	AI-Powered Data Processing & Trading
o	Design AI algorithms for real-time data signal analysis and decision-making.
o	Develop algorithmic trading strategies leveraging blockchain data.
•	Research & Development
o	Stay updated on AI, blockchain, and DeFi advancements.
o	Conduct research to enhance trading strategies and infrastructure.
•	Collaboration & Innovation
o	Work closely with cross-functional teams to drive innovation.
o	Contribute to the company’s overall strategy and vision.
**Requirements:**
•	PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, Machine Learning, or a related field.
•	Strong passion for blockchain, smart contracts, and DeFi protocols.
•	Proficiency in programming languages for AI and trading systems.
•	Experience in building trading systems and financial market models.
•	Knowledge of trading and real-time data processing is a plus.

 
**【DeFi Trader】**
As a DeFi Trader, you will manage and optimize algorithmic trading strategies in decentralized finance (DeFi), with a focus on market making and trading on on-chain DEXs. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in crypto markets, algorithmic trading, and DeFi protocols.

**Responsibilities:**
•	Develop & Execute Trading Strategies
o	Design and optimize algorithmic trading & liquidity provision strategies.
o	Monitor market conditions to identify opportunities and mitigate risks.
•	Collaborate & Innovate
o	Work with smart contract developers to ensure seamless strategy integration.
o	Stay ahead of emerging trends in DeFi and blockchain technology.
**Requirements:**
•	Bachelor’s degree or higher in Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, or related fields.
•	2+ years of experience in onchain crypto trading or market 
•	Strong coding skills in JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or similar languages.
•	Deep understanding of DeFi protocols and blockchain ecosystems.
•	Solid grasp of financial concepts and risk management.
•	Ability to work independently and in a distributed team environment.


**Contract details**

1.	Location: Based in Hong Kong (remote work options available).
2.	Travel requirement: low.
3.	Compensation: includes competitive base cash, bonuses, and token allocations.

**How to apply**

Submit your CV to **hiring@synfutures.com**with title **DeFi Trader_[your name]from Rebase**, or **AI x Blockchain Engineer _[your name]from Rebase**.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
